operations.summary: Submit AI create character design task.
Submit AI create location design task.
Submit AI modify appearance task.

Submit AI modify prop task.
Submit AI modify shot prompt task.
Submit home story expand task (AI_STORY_EXPAND).
Submit global asset analysis task (ANALYZE_GLOBAL).
Submit novel analysis task (ANALYZE_NOVEL).
Submit shot variants analysis task (ANALYZE_SHOT_VARIANTS).
Approve a pending workflow plan and enqueue execution.
Add a new appearance to a global character.
Submit global asset-hub character design task (ASSET_HUB_AI_DESIGN_CHARACTER).
Submit global asset-hub location design task (ASSET_HUB_AI_DESIGN_LOCATION).
Submit asset-hub AI modify character description task.
Submit asset-hub AI modify location description task.
Submit asset-hub AI modify prop description task.
Create a global character and its primary appearance; optionally enqueue reference-to-character task.
Create a global asset folder for the current user.
Create a global location and its initial image placeholders.
Create a global voice entry for the current user.
Delete a global character and cleanup unreferenced provider resources.
Delete a global character appearance by index.
Delete a global asset folder and move assets to root.
Delete a global location.
Delete a global voice entry.
Get a single global character by id.
Get a global location by id.
List global characters for the current user (optionally filtered by folderId).
List global asset folders for the current user.
List global locations for the current user (optionally filtered by folderId).
List global voices for the current user (optionally filtered by folderId).
List global assets for picker (character/location/voice) with preview URLs.
Submit asset-hub reference-to-character task with normalized reference images.
Update a global character (name, folder, voice binding, profile fields).
Update a global character appearance description/changeReason/artStyle.
Update a global asset folder name.
Update a global location (name/summary/folderId).
Update a global voice entry (name/description/folderId).
Upload an audio file into the global voice library and create a GlobalVoice record.
Submit asset hub voice design task (ASSET_HUB_VOICE_DESIGN).
Register a new user and create initial balance record.
Batch create episodes, optionally clearing existing ones; also updates importStatus/lastEpisodeId.
Batch update voicePresetId for a speaker within an episode.
Cancel a run and cancel the linked task (best effort).
Cancel and clear candidate images for a storyboard panel.
Cancel a task owned by the current user and publish cancelled lifecycle payload.
Submit character profile batch confirm task.
Submit character profile confirm task.
Clean up unselected images for characters/locations by deleting unchosen objects and normalizing indices.
Clear storyboard lastError field.
Submit clips build task for an episode.
Confirm a chosen character appearance image selection and delete other candidates.
Confirm selected location image and delete other candidates.
Copy a global asset into the current project asset record.
Create a project character and its primary appearance; optionally trigger reference-to-character background generation.
Add a new character appearance record.
Create a new episode in a project and update lastEpisodeId.
Create a project location and its initial locationImage records.
Create a new project for the current user.
Create a run record for a workflow and target.
Create a storyboard group (clip + storyboard + initial panel) for an episode at an insert index.
Create a new storyboard panel at the end of a storyboard.
Create a voice line for an episode.
Create a persisted command and plan for a fixed workflow package.
Create a workflow plan from a saved skill template (workflow_plan_template).
Delete a project character and cascade appearances; also cleanup unreferenced managed voices.
Delete a character appearance and cleanup stored images; then reindex appearanceIndex.
Delete an episode and update lastEpisodeId if needed.
Delete a project location (cascades images).
Delete the project and cleanup storage objects (destructive).
Delete a storyboard group (panels + storyboard + clip).
Delete a storyboard panel by panelId or by storyboardId plus panelIndex.
Delete video editor project data for an episode.
Delete a voice line and reindex remaining lineIndex.
Dismiss failed tasks in bulk for the current user.
Submit episode split (LLM) task.
Load a rendered preview for the latest workflow artifacts.
Generate character appearance images for a project character.
Batch generate videos for pending panels in an episode.
Generate audio for all pending voice lines in an episode.
Generate location images for a project location.
Generate video for a single storyboard panel.
Generate panel videos for a storyboard panel or an episode batch (async task submission).
Generate audio for a single voice line.
Get full episode data with storyboards/clips/shots/voice lines and update project.lastEpisodeId.
Load project assets (characters, locations, props) with stable media URLs.
Load base project info and update lastAccessedAt.
Get a single command by id (optionally sync status from its linked run).
Get project model and capability override configuration (sanitized).
Load the current project and episode context snapshot.
Load project cost breakdown for the project owner.
Load unified project data payload for the project owner (includes workflow and assets).
Resolve the current project phase, progress counts, active runs, failed items, stale artifacts, and available next actions. Always call this before acting to understand the project state.
Load a project snapshot projection with progress, active runs, latest artifacts, and approvals. Use detail=full to inspect panel-level state including descriptions, prompts, and media URLs.
List downloadable project video URLs (via proxy) for client-side downloads.
Get run snapshot detail for the current user.
Get speaker voice map for an episode with signed preview urls.
Compute SSE bootstrap payload (replay missed events or active lifecycle snapshot).
Get task detail for the current user; optionally includes lifecycle events.
Query task target states for one or more project targets.
Read user API config (decrypted providers, pricing/capabilities enrichment).
Get current user cost summary by project.
Get or initialize the current user preference record.
Get video editor project data for an episode.
Insert a new storyboard panel after an existing panel and enqueue generation.
Generate lip-sync video for a storyboard panel using a voice line (async task submission).
Build a stable download plan for project images (storage keys + filenames).
Build a stable download plan for project videos (storage keys + filenames).
Build a stable download plan for project voice lines (storage keys + filenames).
List episodes for a project ordered by episodeNumber.
List user projects with pagination, cost and basic stats.
List recent command and run status for the current project or episode.
List recent mutation batches that can be reverted (undo).
List run events after a given sequence number.
List runs for the current user with optional filters.
List saved skills (plan templates) for the current user within this project.
List storyboards (clip + panels) for an episode.
List tasks for the current user with optional filters.
List user-enabled models (from userPreference.customModels/customProviders) for config dropdowns.
List balance transactions for the current user with filters and pagination.
List distinct speakers that appear in voice lines for this project.
List voice lines for an episode including matched panel info and normalized media fields.
List available workflow packages and skill catalog entries.
Modify an asset image (character/location) using edit model (async task submission).
Modify a project character image using the edit model.
Modify a project location image using the edit model.
Modify storyboard panel image using edit model (async task submission).
Move storyboard group up/down by swapping clip createdAt ordering.
Apply storyboard mutations, including delete panel, insert panel, update prompts, reorder panels, select candidates, and update panel fields.
Insert a variant panel after an existing panel and enqueue image generation (async task submission).
Update character voice settings (voiceType/voiceId/customVoiceUrl).
Update a location name/summary or update locationImage description/availableSlots.
Save/update user API config.
Submit reference-to-character task.
Regenerate a group of asset images (character/location) by submitting an async task.
Regenerate storyboard panel images (async task submission).
Regenerate a single image by index for character/location (async task submission).
Regenerate storyboard text (async task submission).
Reject a pending workflow plan.
Reorder all panels in a storyboard using an explicit orderedPanelIds list.
Resolve a video proxy key into a fetchable signed URL (storage-only, avoids SSRF).
Retry a failed run step by submitting a new task tied to an existing run.
Revert an asset render (undo regenerate) for character/location assets.
Revert (undo) a mutation batch by id.
Revert (undo) a mutation batch by id without requiring the caller to know its projectId.
Upsert video editor project data for an episode.
Save an existing workflow execution plan as a reusable saved skill template.
Submit screenplay conversion task (SCREENPLAY_CONVERT).
Submit script-to-storyboard run task (SCRIPT_TO_STORYBOARD_RUN) for internal streaming/observe flows.
Select an asset render (character/location) as the canonical chosen image.
Select one storyboard panel candidate image as the final panel image.
Set speaker voice entry for an episode (writes episode.speakerVoices JSON).
Split content into episodes by detecting episode markers (no LLM).
Submit story-to-script run task (STORY_TO_SCRIPT_RUN) for internal streaming/observe flows.
Cancel a previously requested operation.
Confirm a previously requested high-risk operation.
Select multiple options from a previously presented option list.
Acknowledge a safety notice before continuing guarded flows.
Select one option from a previously presented option list.
Update the display label watermark for a selected asset render (character/location).
Update a character name/introduction.
Update a character appearance description list.
Update a project character appearance description (supports indexed description variants).
Update a clip fields (characters/location/props/content/screenplay).
Update an episode fields including audio media ref.
Update a project location image description (stored on locationImage record).
Update project name/description for the project owner.
Update project model keys, artStyle, and capability overrides.
Update a shot prompt field (imagePrompt/videoPrompt).
Update structured storyboard panel fields such as shot, description, timing, or linkage.
Update prompt fields for a storyboard panel.
Update a storyboard photography plan JSON payload.
Update allowed fields of the current user preference record.
Update a voice line fields including media refs and matched panel mapping.
Upload a custom image as character/location asset (adds label bar), and update corresponding records.
Upload custom character voice audio (base64) or save AI designed voice sample.
Submit voice analysis task (VOICE_ANALYZE).
Design a new voice using a text prompt and preview text (async task submission).
Generate voice line audio for one or more voice lines (async task submission).
